name: io.github.luxemarasound-stack/code-quality-scanner
title: Code Quality Scanner
description: Detects vibe-code anti-patterns in AI agent code before production deployment. AST-powered analysis for Python, JavaScript, and LLM prompts. Pay-per-scan via x402 (USDC on Base).

headers.name: X-Payment-Tx
headers.description: x402 payment transaction hash (USDC on Base). Send 0.05 USDC to receive this hash.
